# cancelDatabaseTransfer

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the cancelDatabaseTransfer mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk cancel-database-transfer --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.transferId <UUID>
```

## Examples
